channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2920] LB_LINUX_MODPOST: command not found during ldiskfs build
item.description:
/usr/src/kernels/2.6.32-279.2.1.el6.x86_64
/usr/src/kernels/2.6.32-279.2.1.el6.x86_64
checking for Linux sources... /var/lib/jenkins/workspace/lustre-master/arch/x86_64/build_type/server/distro/el6/ib_stack/inkernel/BUILD/reused/usr/src/kernels/2.6.32-279.19.1.el6_lustre.x86_64

checking for quilt... no
item.summary: LB_LINUX_MODPOST: command not found during ldiskfs build

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
verified

checking name of module symbol version file... Module.symvers
checking if Linux was built with CONFIG_MODULES... yes
